name: Do AI Agents Know When a Task Is Simple? Toward Complexity-Aware Reasoning and Execution
summary: arXiv:2607.13034v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly automate multi-step engineering and informatics workflows, yet they rarely ask how much effort a task...
description: arXiv:2607.13034v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly automate multi-step engineering and informatics workflows, yet they rarely ask how much effort a task actually requires. They often follow a maximum-context-first strategy--re-reading files and dependencies they have already seen--turning a one-line edit into a small code-base audit. We argue the miss...
author: Junjie Yin, Xinyu Feng
